clock_pair_block.raw_xml: <conditionalFormatting sqref="C3:D202"><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1574" priority="1100" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(C3<>"",ISTEXT(C3),OR(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("PTO",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("OUT SICK",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("N/A",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("CASR",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("CAR ISSUE",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("DAY OFF",UPPER(C3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("OFF DAY",UPPER(C3)))))</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1570" priority="1101" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND($A3<>"",OR($C3="",$D3=""),$C3<>$D3,NOT(OR(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("PTO",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("OUT SICK",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("N/A",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("CASR",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("CAR ISSUE",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("DAY OFF",UPPER($C3&$D3))),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("OFF DAY",UPPER($C3&$D3))))))</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1573" priority="1102" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($C3),ISNUMBER($D3),MOD($D3-$C3,1)*24>=12)</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1572" priority="1103" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($C3),ISNUMBER($D3),MOD($D3-$C3,1)*24>8,MOD($D3-$C3,1)*24<12)</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1571" priority="1104" stopIfTrue="1"><formula>AND(ISNUMBER($C3),ISNUMBER($D3),MOD($D3-$C3,1)*24>0,MOD($D3-$C3,1)*24<8)</formula></cfRule><cfRule type="expression" dxfId="1575" priority="1105"><formula>AND(C3<>"",ISTEXT(C3),OR(ISNUMBER(SEARCH("/",C3)),ISNUMBER(SEARCH(" - ",C3)),ISNUMBER(SEARCH("|",C3)),ISNUMBER(SEARCH(";",C3))))</formula></cfRule></conditionalFormatting>
